protocol.hypothesis: contra-dislocation trade after direct perp-spot basis residual begins absorbing toward zero
protocol.orthogonalization: direct perp-spot log basis residualized against completed Binance premium-index close with trailing shifted OLS
protocol.normalization: current values compared with rolling mean/std fitted strictly through t-1
protocol.preflight_revision: the initial 96-policy contra-only and then 192-policy symmetric contraction passes produced zero eligible paths and were uniformly negative; expansion-onset with fixed hold was added before any 2024+ replay
protocol.entry: next 5m open after completed futures and spot bar
protocol.exit: contraction: next open after residual |z| <= 0.5 or sign cross; expansion onset: fixed max hold
protocol.mdd: strict entry cost plus intrabar adverse OHLC and realized high-water
protocol.marginal_rule: must improve deterministic six-sleeve union on both combined absolute return and CAGR/MDD
protocol.status_ceiling: shadow research because later calendar windows are not fresh to the programme

protocol_scope_correction: Frozen manifest wording says absorption, but documented preflight added expansion_onset before OOS; contraction had zero eligible paths and every selected replay row is expansion_onset.
